message.content:
@startuml

actor "Organization Employee" as OE

participant ":CreateTaskUI" as UI
participant ":CreateTaskController" as Ctrl
participant "ApplicationPOT" as AppPOT
participant "app\n:ApplicationPOT" as app
participant "session\n:UserSession" as session
participant ":Platform" as Platform
participant "org\n:Organization" as org
participant "cat\n:Category" as cat
participant "lc\n:List<Category>" as lc

activate OE

OE -> UI : 1 asks to create a new task
activate UI

UI --> OE : 2 requests data (reference, designation, informal\n description, technical description, duration, cost)

OE -> UI : 3 types requested data
UI -> Ctrl : 4 lc=getTaskCategories()
activate Ctrl
Ctrl -> Platform : 5 lc=getTaskCategories()
activate Platform
Platform --> lc
activate lc
deactivate lc
deactivate Platform
deactivate Ctrl

UI --> OE : 6 shows task categories list and ask to select one

OE -> UI : 7 selects a task category

UI -> Ctrl : 8 createTask(ref,designation,informalDesc,technicalDesc,duration,cost,categoryId)
activate Ctrl

Ctrl -> lc : 9 cat=getCategoryById(categoryId)
activate lc
deactivate lc

Ctrl -> Ctrl : 10 app = getInstance()

Ctrl -> AppPOT : 11 session = getCurrentSession()
activate AppPOT
deactivate AppPOT

Ctrl -> session : 12 email = getUserEmail()
activate session
deactivate session

Ctrl -> Platform : 13 org = getOrganizationByUserEmail(email)
activate Platform
deactivate Platform

Ctrl -> org : 14 task=createTask(ref,designation,informalDesc,technicalDesc,duration,cost,cat)
activate org

create participant "task\n:Task" as task
org -> task : 15 create(ref,designation,informalDesc,technicalDesc,duration,cost,cat)
activate task
deactivate task

org -> task : 16 validateTask(task)
activate task
deactivate task

deactivate org

Ctrl --> UI : 17 result
deactivate Ctrl

UI --> OE : 18 shows all data and requests confirmation

OE -> UI : 19 confirms the data

UI -> Ctrl : 20 saveTask()
activate Ctrl

Ctrl -> org : 21 saveTask(task)
activate org

org -> task : 22 validateTask(task)
activate task
deactivate task

org -> task : 23 addTask(task)
activate task
deactivate task

deactivate org

Ctrl --> UI : 24 result
deactivate Ctrl

UI --> OE : 25 informs operation success

deactivate UI
deactivate OE

@enduml
